examples: Boar taint originates from androstenone and skatole.
Pork flavor is associated with flavoring substances and intramuscular lipids in the meat. Boar taint originates from androstenone and skatole.
"They included skatole, a component of feces; trimethylamine, one of the essences of rotting fish; and several of the more pungent fatty acids that contribute to rancid human body odor, " Ed says.
